note: Snapshots extracted from the three OB Excel sources. Regenerate with scripts/extract-recon-sources.py.

sources.agreements: OB Agreements and Invoices 2025-2026.xlsx / sheet 'Agreements' (master client list = HVHH, incl. inactive/exceptions)
sources.refuseniks: OB Agreements and Invoices.xlsx / sheet 'Отказники' (left/refused clients)
sources.chats_without_bot: Чаты.xlsx / sheet 'Chats without bot' (account export: which chats have the bot)
sources.onebusiness: One Business.xlsx / sheet 'Основные данные' (client master with accountant, HVHH, status)
